inferred_requirements: IR-001: open() must probe NVMe, attach first controller, open NS 1
IR-002: read_blocks(lba, buf) must perform zero-copy read via DMA buffer
IR-003: write_blocks(lba, buf) must perform zero-copy write via DMA buffer
IR-004: close() must free qpair and detach controller
IR-005: sector_size() must return sector size in bytes, 0 if not open
IR-006: num_sectors() must return total sectors, 0 if not open
IR-007: is_open() must report open/closed state
IR-008: Buffer length must be a positive multiple of sector size
IR-009: open() must fail with LoggerNotConnected if logger not wired
IR-010: open() must fail with EnvNotInitialized if spdk_env not wired
IR-011: open() must fail with AlreadyOpen if already open
IR-012: close() must fail with NotOpen if not open
IR-013: Drop must clean up if device still open
IR-014: Component must provide IBasicBlockDevice via query
IR-015: Actor path must satisfy single-thread-per-qpair invariant
IR-016: Actor on_stop must close device if still open

unspecced.feature: Basic I/O and Actor I/O examples

notes.duplicate_interface_definition: IBasicBlockDevice is defined in both components/interfaces/src/iblock_device.rs and src/lib.rs via define_interface! macro. Both copies appear identical but have no formal synchronization mechanism.
notes.test_coverage: Unit tests cover component construction, receptacle wiring, pre-flight error conditions, and Drop safety. No integration tests (require real NVMe hardware).
